checks.action: Run npm run model:movenet:assets:download to refresh public/model-assets.json and model files.
checks.detail: Static model asset manifest exists with the expected schema version.
checks.label: Static asset manifest

checks.action: Keep app.json expo.extra.tfjsMoveNetModelUrl aligned with the static manifest modelUrl.
checks.detail: App config points TensorFlow.js MoveNet at /models/movenet/singlepose/lightning/4/model.json.
checks.label: App model URL

checks.action: Download a valid TFJS graph model JSON before exporting the PWA.
checks.detail: Source model.json includes a TensorFlow.js weights manifest.
checks.label: Source model JSON

checks.action: Keep every weight shard referenced by model.json present under public/models.
checks.detail: Source model graph and 2 weight shard(s) are present, non-empty, and not HTML responses.
checks.label: Source weight shards

checks.action: Keep public/sw.js loading /model-assets.json and pre-caching listed model files.
checks.detail: Service worker pre-caches the static model asset manifest and serves model files cache-first.
checks.label: Service worker model cache

checks.action: Run npm run export:web after refreshing model assets so dist contains the same static model files.
checks.detail: Exported dist contains model-assets.json, model.json, and 2 valid weight shard(s).
checks.label: Exported model assets

checks.action: Keep public/model-assets.json asset list aligned with model.json weight references.
checks.detail: Static asset manifest lists every model graph and weight shard path.
checks.label: Manifest asset list

summary.nextAction: Keep static MoveNet assets versioned and rerun web smoke after model updates.
